inputs.name: allowEmptySearch
inputs.description: Whether to allow empty searches when using a data source, meaning all results will be displayed when the search input is empty.

inputs.name: appearance
inputs.description: Additional appearance configuration.

inputs.name: busyIndicatorAriaValueText
inputs.description: Aria value text for the busy indicator.

inputs.name: busyIndicatorTitle
inputs.description: Title for the busy indicator.

inputs.name: categories
inputs.description: List of categories.

inputs.name: categoryLabel
inputs.description: Set label for category dropdown button.

inputs.name: categoryMode
inputs.description: Type of component used to render the categories dropdown.

inputs.name: currentCategory
inputs.description: Current category, value should be present in categories array

inputs.name: dataSource
inputs.description: Datasource for suggestion list

inputs.name: disableRefresh
inputs.description: Whether display Refresh button

inputs.name: disableSearch
inputs.description: Whether display search button

inputs.name: disableSuggestionsFoundAnnouncer
inputs.description: Whether to disable the "suggestions found" live announcer.

inputs.name: enableSelection
inputs.description: Whether to display a suggestion item as selected after it has been clicked.

inputs.name: forceSearchButton
inputs.description: Whether to always show search button.

inputs.name: hideCategoryLabel
inputs.description: Hide display of category label

inputs.name: initialSuggestionEmptySubline
inputs.description: Title of the initial suggestion if the user has entered some text and there are no results to display, and an initial suggestion subline should be shown.

inputs.name: initialSuggestionEmptyTitle
inputs.description: Title of the initial suggestion if the user has entered some text and there are no results to display, and an initial suggestion title should be shown.

inputs.name: initialSuggestionSubline
inputs.description: Subline of the initial suggestion, if a suggestion list is displayed.

inputs.name: initialSuggestionTitle
inputs.description: Title of the initial suggestion, if a suggestion list is displayed.

inputs.name: inputText
inputs.description: Initial input text.

inputs.name: isLoading
inputs.description: Toggle "loading" mode.

inputs.name: mobile
inputs.description: Set Mobile Mode

inputs.name: mobileConfig
inputs.description: Search Field Mobile configuration

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Placeholder text for search input field.

inputs.name: searchResultsEmptyDefaultSuggestions
inputs.description: Options to display when the user has entered a string into the input that returns no results.

inputs.name: searchResultsEmptyTemplate
inputs.description: Template to display when the search results list has no items to display.

inputs.name: showAdvancedFilter
inputs.description: Whether to show the advanced filter button, which emits the event `advancedFilterButtonClick`. If this input is set to true, it will override any other category button settings.

inputs.name: showCategoryAllOption
inputs.description: Whether to show the "All" option in the category select.

inputs.name: suggestionFooter
inputs.description: Subline of the initial suggestion, if a suggestion list is displayed.

inputs.name: suggestions
inputs.description: List of string values to populate suggestion dropdown selection.

inputs.name: suggestionsLoading
inputs.description: Whether to display the busy indicator over the suggestion list.

outputs.name: advancedFilterButtonClick
outputs.description: Event emitted when the advanced filter button is clicked.

outputs.name: categoryModeChange
outputs.description: Type of component used to render the categories dropdown.

outputs.name: forceSearchButtonChange
outputs.description: Whether to always show search button.

methods.name: resetCategory
methods.description: Resets the current category to its initial state.
